full_text:
Ji Yan (Zixiu) 曁豔 (子休)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ji Yan (曁豔), styledZixiu (子休). Tried to impose harsh methods to purge corruption. This led to his forced suicide. Ji Yan was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
